description: Measure the atmospheric extinction coefficient for the observation site using the sequence of 15 FITS images in ~/AstroImages/extinction_data/ and the reference star coordinates in ~/AstroImages/instructions.txt. Calculate the primary extinction coefficient as the linear slope of Instrumental Magnitude (M = -2.5 * log10(Flux)) versus Airmass. Save the photometry data to ~/AstroImages/measurements/photometry_results.csv and record the result in ~/AstroImages/measurements/extinction_report.txt using the format 'EXTINCTION_COEFFICIENT: 0.XX'. Login credentials: username 'ga', password 'password123'.
